mapper.sql: id, exam_id, student_id, start_time, deadline_time, submit_time, status, grading_status, score, created_at, updated_at
mapper.insert: insert into student_exam_record (exam_id, student_id, start_time, deadline_time, submit_time, status, grading_status, score, created_at, updated_at) values (#{examId}, #{studentId}, #{startTime}, #{deadlineTime}, #{submitTime}, #{status}, #{gradingStatus}, #{score}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt})
mapper.update: update student_exam_record set submit_time = #{submitTime}, status = #{status}, grading_status = #{gradingStatus}, score = #{score}, updated_at = #{updatedAt} where id = #{id} and status = 'IN_PROGRESS'
